actionUnits.condition: Simulate EventTrigger PointerClick (eventID=4, guid=d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) on Building9 to invoke Government.showlabel (MonoBehaviour fileID=1647098181, guid=ed3b45ff7bbab2146bc55b624801e08e). Expect the Player's child[1] TextMeshPro text to be set to the first 20 chars of 'Government:Police Department' => 'Government:Police De'. Ensure Start() has initialized 'label' before invoking.

The persistent call (m_Calls) targets Government.showlabel on MonoBehaviour id=1647098181 (guid=ed3b45ff7bbab2146bc55b624801e08e).
